meta.title: Tuğba Erdoğanlar — Senior Clinical Research Associate
meta.description: Senior Clinical Research Associate with nearly two decades of experience in monitoring and managing clinical trials across leading CROs and sponsors — oncology, nephrology, cardiovascular, medical devices and more, Phase I–IV.

hero.name: Tuğba Erdoğanlar
hero.title: Senior Clinical Research Associate
hero.tagline: Nearly two decades monitoring and managing clinical trials — from site feasibility and start-up through monitoring and close-out — across a broad therapeutic landscape.

about.heading: Profile
about.p1: Senior Clinical Research Associate with nearly two decades of experience in the monitoring and management of clinical trials across leading CROs and sponsors. Broad therapeutic expertise spanning oncology, nephrology, cardiovascular, infectious disease, vaccines and medical devices, with deep command of ICH-GCP, SOPs and EC/MoH regulatory submissions in Türkiye and internationally.
about.p2: Experienced across Phase I–IV studies — from site feasibility and start-up through routine monitoring and close-out. A chemical-engineering background underpins a rigorous, detail-driven and quality-focused approach to every trial.

experience.heading: Professional Experience
experience.intro: Two decades across leading clinical research organisations and sponsors.

items: Routine site monitoring and close-out of clinical sites per Sponsor SOPs, ICH Guidelines and GCP.
Conduct of pre-study and site initiation visits; maintenance of study files.
Full-cycle site monitoring — routine through close-out — for clinical studies per Sponsor SOPs, ICH Guidelines and GCP.
Pre-study and initiation visits; oversight of study files and data quality.
Ethics Committee (EC) and Ministry of Health (MoH) submissions and IVDR application support.
End-to-end site monitoring per Sponsor SOPs, ICH Guidelines and GCP, including study-file maintenance.
Site monitoring and site management per Sponsor SOPs, ICH Guidelines and GCP.
Pre-study and initiation visits; routine monitoring, close-out and study-file maintenance.
EC and MoH submissions and IVDR applications.
Preparation and maintenance of start-up documents, Site Files and Trial Master Files.
Liaison with regulatory authorities; updates to Protocol, ICF, CRF and study-related documents.
Managed the clinical monitoring process and administration of medical-device trials.
EC and MoH submissions and IVDR applications; organisation of Site Files and Trial Master Files.
Authored and updated Protocols, ICFs, CRFs and SOPs.
Led the clinical monitoring process and the administration of clinical trials.
Supervised CRAs across in-house and on-site monitoring, filing and trial administration.
Managed regulatory submissions and CRO/supplier relationships; ensured adherence to SOPs, GCP and Turkish regulations.
On-site and co-monitoring visits; EC and regulatory-authority submissions.
Site feasibility, identification and selection; site, center and core file management.
Study monitoring and liaison with regulatory authorities.
Import and export of clinical trial materials, study drugs and biological samples per customs procedures.
Client sales contact and preparation of export documentation.
Verification of bank documents and customs declaration documents.
Supported the preparation of proposals and project documents.
Technical project translation and research-based reporting.

therapeutic.heading: Therapeutic & Study Experience
therapeutic.intro: A broad therapeutic footprint built over 30+ studies — filter by area or phase to explore.

GCP & Monitoring in Drug Clinical Research — ARGEFAR
Review of Terminology in Clinical Research

items: Investigator & Monitor Meetings — protocol, IMP handling, e-CRF, SAE reporting
LAA Conference — catheter-based left atrial appendage closure

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.intro: Open to senior clinical research opportunities and collaborations. The best way to reach me is by email or LinkedIn.
